title: 4 Pairs Drum Sticks 5A, Maple Wood Tip Drumstick Drum Sticks for Electric Drums Classic Maple Wood Drumsticks Drums Accessories for Adults Kids and Beginners Practice (wood)
features: [ Quality Maple Construction] Made from high-quality maple wood, these classic maple wood drumsticks offer the perfect balance of strength, flexibility, and responsiveness. Maple is a favourite among drummers for its light weight and smooth rebound, helping reduce wrist fatigue during long sessions. The carefully polished surface provides a comfortable grip and professional feel, while the sturdy wood tip ensures rich, full tones and long-lasting performance for all playing styles.

[Standard 5A Size ] Each pair measures 40.6 cm (16 inches) in length and 1.4 cm (0.55 inches) in diameter, making these drum sticks suitable for a wide variety of musical genres. Their well-balanced weight distribution ensures consistent control, whether you’re playing soft jazz or powerful rock beats. Ideal for beginners, students, and seasoned drummers, the 5A size remains the industry standard for balanced comfort and precision.

[Strong and Long-Lasting Design] These maple wood tip drumsticks are crafted to withstand intense practice and performance. The durable maple grain resists chipping and cracking, maintaining shape and tone even after extended use. The straight, smooth finish enhances grip stability and reduces slippage. Whether you’re rehearsing daily or performing live, these sticks provide dependable quality and resilience, ensuring confident drumming every time.

[Lightweight and Comfortable Grip] Designed for comfort and speed, these wood drum sticks feel light in the hand, making them ideal for fast, controlled playing. Their smooth surface minimises hand fatigue, enabling extended practice sessions with ease. Suitable for youth bands, orchestras, or home practice, their balanced weight offers both beginners and professionals the responsive rebound needed for precise rhythm work.

[Great Gift] This set of 4 pairs offers excellent value and makes a thoughtful gift for drummers, teachers, or music students. Perfect for practice sessions, classroom teaching, and stage performance, these drum sticks 5A style tools support every skill level. A great way to encourage creativity and rhythm learning in kids and adults alike, they’re a must-have addition to any drummer’s kit.
description: Crafted from durable, lightweight maple, each stick delivers excellent sound quality and a comfortable grip for extended use. The standard 5A size (40.6 × 1.4 cm) offers the ideal mix of reach, power, and precision for most drumming styles — from jazz and pop to rock and fusion. Designed to be stronger and straighter than typical sticks, they’re built to last through hours of practice and live performance without cracking or warping. Material: Wood Dimensions: 40.6 x 1.4 cm
